raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX I booked a XXXX XXXX vacation package and made installment payments toward the package using my Citi credit card. The package included airfare and land services ( resort accommodations and related services ), and the total package price was approximately {$10000.00}. 

In early XX/XX/XXXX, travel became impossible on XXXX ( the travel date ) due to a government-mandated airspace closure affecting the XXXX. As a result, we were unable to reach the destination and the land services associated with the package were never rendered. 

American Airlines refunded the airfare portion of the trip. XXXX XXXX also issued a small partial refund for ground transportation that could not be provided. However, the remaining land portion of the package was not refunded. 

I disputed two installment payments related to this package with Citi : one payment made in XX/XX/XXXX for approximately {$1600.00} and another payment made in XX/XX/XXXX for approximately {$4200.00} After reviewing the documentation provided, Citi approved and refunded the XX/XX/XXXX installment ( {$4200.00} ) on the basis that the services were not rendered. However, Citi denied the XX/XX/XXXX installment ( {$1600.00} ), even though it relates to the same underlying travel package and the same non-rendered services. The travel date was XXXX so it should be treated as a service from that date, not the original payment date. 

Both transactions were installment payments toward the identical package. Because Citi has already determined that the services associated with this package were not rendered, the denial of the XXXX installment appears inconsistent. 

The remaining installment payments for this same package were made on another credit card and are currently under separate dispute review. Refunds for the airfare and a small portion of ground transportation have already been processed. 

I am requesting reconsideration of the XXXX installment dispute and consistent treatment of both charges related to the same non-provided services.
